title: settings.local.json の permissions.allow (Edit 規則) も sandbox 書込境界にマージ -> project で絞っても local が穴を開ける。釘付けは project の denyWrite (deny 常勝は層 x スコープ跨ぎでも成立)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-localrule/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.

Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-localrule-ctrl/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: The command was blocked: `operation not permitted: $HOME/lab-localrule-ctrl/probe.txt`

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-localrule-pin/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: The command is blocked with an "operation not permitted" error on that file path.

hypothesis: permission 規則の sandbox 境界へのマージはスコープを問わず起きる: settings.local.json の Edit allow 規則だけで cwd 外へ Bash 書込が通る (allow x ok)。つまり project の settings.json で allowWrite を絞っても、開発者 (または『don't ask again』の1クリック) が local に置いた Edit 規則が OS 層の境界に穴を開ける。防ぐ側: project の sandbox.filesystem.denyWrite は local の Edit allow がマージされても勝つ (allow x ng) = 死守したいパスは allowWrite を絞るだけでなく denyWrite で明示的に釘付けする。
